title: The Guest
description: This small horror mod adds the GUEST from HELLO GUEST/HELLO NEIGHBOR 2 to Minecraft...
body:
![The Guest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ea5f778308e10c07f3414db444691d781b1e959_0.webp)

**This mod adds the GUEST from HELLO GUEST / HELLO NEIGHBOR 2 to Minecraft!**

---

This is a **light horror mod** that brings the eerie and mysterious Guest into your world.
The Guest **spawns at night** and will try to **listen for nearby players**—though this behavior is still experimental and may not always work as intended.

This is a very early version of the mod, and many features are still in development.

**Current Features:**

- The Guest as a fully functional new entity
- Nighttime spawning behavior
- Experimental “hearing” system that lets the Guest react to player sounds
- Light jumpscares

**Planned Features:**

- More interactive items and blocks
- Improved AI behavior and more reliable sound detection
- New animations, sounds, and environment mechanics
- Additional scares, secrets, and world interactions

---

Expect frequent updates as the mod grows and becomes more immersive.
Have fun—and watch your back at night!
